testcase.name: test_coding_prompt_completes

failure.message: AssertionError: unexpected role for coding prompt: coding (learned) assert 'coding (learned)' in ('coding', 'technical', 'reasoning')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_feedback_rl.py:158: in test_coding_prompt_completes assert d["role"] in ("coding", "technical", "reasoning"), f"unexpected role for coding prompt: {d['role']}" E AssertionError: unexpected role for coding prompt: coding (learned) E assert 'coding (learned)' in ('coding', 'technical', 'reasoning')
